column2: Action

Inspect the court file and record the status of the 04/03/2026 order sheet, D2's separate written statement, the 13/03/2026 rejoinder, and the 18/05/2026 production (lease, bank statement, minutes book, all 5 resolutions, nomination document).
Obtain from Mavelikkara the documents needed to refute D2's reply to IA 9/2025.
Press IA 5/2026 to restrain commercialization of the Trust property.
Press IA 6/2026 for production of the Trust accounts.
Argue IA 2 and IA 9 using the Contradictions Matrix.

Draft and file the written objection to the 18/05/2026 IA on three grounds: (a) contradiction with the 16/02/2026 affidavit; (b) lease defect under ss.28/49; (c) ultra vires 'nomination as beneficiary' barred by S.92 IEA / S.95 BSA.
Move for an adverse inference against D2 for concealing the business venture on the premises and for producing documents after swearing none existed.

File the Order VI Rule 17 application to amend the plaint to add the Sreemoolavasam facts, the lease, the bank account, the O.S. 243/2024 fabrications and the 16/02/2026 false statements, and to add the reliefs of void lease, interim injunction, eviction and disgorgement.
File the application to restore the suit against D3 with fresh substituted service to D3's known USA address.
File the Order VIII Rule 10 application against D2 if D2 has filed no separate written statement.

File the OP(C) 3278/2025 application to recall the 04/03/2026 IA 5 closure and direct production, pleading violation of the directed timeline by a false affidavit and suppression by Defendants 2 and 3.
Press OP(C) 3278/2025 for early disposal of IA 5/2026 and IA 6/2026.
File the application to appoint a receiver over the Trust property and to preserve Federal Bank a/c 13100200004482.
Compile one master chronology across the connected civil and criminal proceedings as the basis for the Contradictions Matrix.
File the IG Registration complaint regarding the Marad registration.
File the Section 91 BNSS summons to Federal Bank to obtain the KYC file for a/c 13100200004482.
Establish the s.63 BSA evidence chain for the video: trace the original file, identify the person who recorded it, obtain the certificate and hash value, and engage an expert to verify it.
Inspect the 18/05/2026 production and the produced accounts and minutes, and document any misappropriation.
File and press the application to remove and replace D2 as Managing Trustee.
Draft and file the Section 215 BNSS application against D2's false sworn statements, grounded in the Contradictions Matrix (the s.340 CrPC / s.215 BNSS perjury reference).
Prepare and file the breach-of-trust complaint against all signatories to the 12.02.2020 and 'D3 need not account' resolutions, pleading common intention.
Prosecute the lease set-aside, eviction and disgorgement reliefs to final orders.
File the application for appointment of the client as Managing Trustee.
Resolve the foreign-domicile obstacle to the client's appointment as Managing Trustee.
Negotiate beneficiary releases and a family settlement with all beneficiaries except the client's sister.
File the RTI 89/RTI/2026 details (09.08.2024 sequence: call 10:56, police attendance 11:15, complaint 16:20) in CMP 2828/2024.
File the complaint against SI Vishal V on the Chief Minister's grievance portal.
File the complaint against Rajesh IFS on the Chief Minister's grievance portal.
